g.text: Strict mediation via A remains unsupported:

text.style: fill: #687782; font: 10px 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', sans-serif

g.text: all Sobel p-values > 0.36 and all bootstrap intervals cross zero.

text.style: fill: #262626; font: 700 13px 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: Figure 6X. Mechanism evidence matrix aligned with the current formal writing boundary

text.style: fill: #687782; font: 10.5px 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: The left panel shows why 'interface-first' must be written weakly; the right panel shows that the A→B link is the main chain break. The figure is built to support the phrase 'direction exists, strict mediation remains limited.'
